questions.question: Who was the first Prime Minister of India?
questions.explanation: Jawaharlal Nehru was the first Prime Minister of India, serving from 1947 to 1964.

questions.question: In which year did India gain independence?
questions.explanation: India gained independence on August 15, 1947, after the end of British colonial rule.

questions.question: Who is known as the 'Father of the Nation' in India?
questions.explanation: Mahatma Gandhi is known as the 'Father of the Nation' for his role in India's independence movement.

questions.question: Which movement was launched by Gandhi in 1942?
questions.explanation: The Quit India Movement was launched by Mahatma Gandhi in 1942, demanding an end to British rule.

questions.question: Who wrote the Indian National Anthem 'Jana Gana Mana'?
questions.explanation: Rabindranath Tagore wrote 'Jana Gana Mana', which was adopted as India's national anthem.
